MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Guardian (Conservator).

Ms. Shomer stated that the accounting petition was e-filed on Friday December 29th and that it is still pending. Status on filing of the Sixth Account is continued to January 16, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Nov-21-2017 Continued To Jan-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Guardian (Trustee).

Ms. Shomer requested a continuance stating that more time is needed, that the accounting was always done in the conservatorship, that the department that prepared it was not aware that there is a separate case for the special needs trust and that they need to re-do it. Ms. Shomer also stated that accountings in the conservatorship are waived, that she is requesting to have an accounting in the conservatorship, that she will be doing one and that she would like enough time to get both accountings done. Status on filing of the sixth account is continued to January 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Johnson. Not reported.
